calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Withdrawal Of Funds From Blocked Account
Off Calendar Dec-22-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Latonia Johnson (Mother of the Minor).

Ms. Johnson explained that her Daughter was in need of a new bed, that she was low on funds as she was currently unemployed and stated that she had placed the bed on lay away at a store called "Today's Furniture". In addition, Ms. Johnson stated that she intended to replace the funds when she got her income tax refund. The Court reminded Ms. Johnson that the money belonged to the Minor and stated that multiple withdrawals had been made. The Court permitted the withdrawal from the blocked account. The Court will prepare the order.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Receipts For School Clothes And Supplies
Off Calendar Sep-10-2008 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-25-2008 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2008 Vacated

Compromise Of Minor'S Claims Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-05-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
John C. Smith, Esq. for Petitioner: Latonia Johnson, present as Guardian ad litem for: Brittany Carpenter, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
The gross amount or value of the settlement in favor of claimant is $12,000.00
Medical Expenses $4,000.00
A net balance of $8,000.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of the West, Mission Street Branch, 2812 Mission Street, San Francisco, 94110. No withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account were submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Set For Trial On Jul-14-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jun-30-08 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 318
